'''ât-h-h''' ('''shatahah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:necrotise|necrotise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:necrotise|necrotise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-h-h
|-
! Lemma
| shatahah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitahah|thitahah]] || [[word:jitahah|jitahah]] || [[word:shitahah|shitahah]] || [[word:kitahah|kitahah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutahah|thuthutahah]] || [[word:jujutahah|jujutahah]] || [[word:shushutahah|shushutahah]] || [[word:kukutahah|kukutahah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutahah|thutahah]] || [[word:jutahah|jutahah]] || [[word:shutahah|shutahah]] || [[word:kutahah|kutahah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutahah|thutahah]] || [[word:jutahah|jutahah]] || [[word:shutahah|shutahah]] || [[word:kutahah|kutahah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetahah|thetahah]] || [[word:jetahah|jetahah]] || [[word:shetahah|shetahah]] || [[word:ketahah|ketahah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotahah|thothotahah]] || [[word:jojotahah|jojotahah]] || [[word:shoshotahah|shoshotahah]] || [[word:kokotahah|kokotahah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotahah|thotahah]] || [[word:jotahah|jotahah]] || [[word:shotahah|shotahah]] || [[word:kotahah|kotahah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotahah|thotahah]] || [[word:jotahah|jotahah]] || [[word:shotahah|shotahah]] || [[word:kotahah|kotahah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtahah|thĂŠtahah]] || [[word:jĂŠtahah|jĂŠtahah]] || [[word:shĂŠtahah|shĂŠtahah]] || [[word:kĂŠtahah|kĂŠtahah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatahah|thathatahah]] || [[word:jajatahah|jajatahah]] || [[word:shashatahah|shashatahah]] || [[word:kakatahah|kakatahah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatahah|thatahah]] || [[word:jatahah|jatahah]] || [[word:shatahah|shatahah]] || [[word:katahah|katahah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatahah|thatahah]] || [[word:jatahah|jatahah]] || [[word:shatahah|shatahah]] || [[word:katahah|katahah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatahah|shatahah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatahah|goshatahah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatahah|gokishatahah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatahahnĂŒ|shatahahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatahahnknĂŒ|goshatahahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahahnĂŒ|gokishatahahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatahahshĂ«|shatahahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatahahnkshĂ«|goshatahahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatahahshĂ«|gokishatahahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahahro|shatahahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahahnkro|goshatahahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahahro|gokishatahahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahahmu|shatahahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahahnkmu|goshatahahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahahmu|gokishatahahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatahahsher|shatahahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatahahnksher|goshatahahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatahahsher|gokishatahahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatahahng|shatahahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatahahnkng|goshatahahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatahahng|gokishatahahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatahahya|shatahahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatahahnkya|goshatahahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatahahya|gokishatahahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatahahyam|shatahahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatahahnkyam|goshatahahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatahahyam|gokishatahahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatahahnĂŒshĂ«|shatahahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatahahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatahahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatahahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatahahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahahnĂŒro|shatahahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahahnknĂŒro|goshatahahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahahnĂŒro|gokishatahahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahahnĂŒmu|shatahahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahahnknĂŒmu|goshatahahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahahnĂŒmu|gokishatahahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatahahshĂ«nĂŒ|shatahahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatahahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatahahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatahahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahahshĂ«ro|shatahahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahahnkshĂ«ro|goshatahahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahahshĂ«ro|gokishatahahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahahshĂ«mu|shatahahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahahnkshĂ«mu|goshatahahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahahshĂ«mu|gokishatahahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatahahronĂŒ|shatahahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatahahnkronĂŒ|goshatahahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahahronĂŒ|gokishatahahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatahahroshĂ«|shatahahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatahahnkroshĂ«|goshatahahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatahahroshĂ«|gokishatahahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahahromu|shatahahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahahnkromu|goshatahahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahahromu|gokishatahahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatahahmunĂŒ|shatahahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatahahnkmunĂŒ|goshatahahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahahmunĂŒ|gokishatahahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatahahmushĂ«|shatahahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatahahnkmushĂ«|goshatahahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatahahmushĂ«|gokishatahahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahahmuro|shatahahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahahnkmuro|goshatahahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahahmuro|gokishatahahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
